questionHtml:
Enzyme activity is affected by temperature and pH.

In biotechnology, enzymes are used to transfer genes to bacteria. Outline how two specific enzymes are used for the transfer.
markschemeHtml:
1. restriction enzymes/(restriction) endonucleases cut the gene and the bacterial/plasmid/vector DNA in the same/specific restriction sites
    OR
    (restriction) endonucleases work by targeting a specific sequence of base pairs in DNA causing both strands of the DNA to break apart;
  2. (DNA) ligase attaches/inserts the gene to the bacterial/plasmid/vector DNA
    OR
    (DNA) ligase joins the vector and gene by fusing their sugar-phosphate backbones together (with a covalent phosphodiester bond);
  3. correct reference to reverse transcriptase;

Accept correct mention of reverse transcriptase.

meta.title: In biotechnology, enzymes are used to transfer genes to bacteria. Outline how two specific enzymes are used for the transfer.
